cases.prompt: 이 함수 좀 정리해줘, 동작은 그대로 두고 리팩토링만

assertions.text: Makes structural improvements that preserve behavior, adding no new features.
Establishes a test safety net first (runs existing tests or adds characterization tests before refactoring).

cases.prompt: Refactor this module and extract that big block into its own function.

assertions.text: Makes small behavior-preserving steps (extract/rename/inline) and verifies tests after each.
Stays within the requested scope and avoids while-I'm-here scope creep.
Confirms all tests still pass and the public API is unchanged or callers updated.
